[35m0

[33m;
[39m
[36mfunction
[39m tok(n){t[n]
[33m=
[39m
[33mR
[39m
[33m++
[39m}
[36mvar
[39m safeRegexReplacements
[33m=
[39m[[
[32m"\\s"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[35m1
[39m]
[33m,
[39m[
[32m"\\d"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[33mMAX_LENGTH
[39m]
[33m,
[39m[
[32m"[a-zA-Z0-9-]"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[33mMAX_SAFE_BUILD_LENGTH
[39m]]
[33m;
[39m
[36mfunction
[39m makeSafeRe(value){
[36mfor
[39m(
[36mvar
[39m i
[33m=
[39m
[35m0
[39m
[33m;
[39mi
[33m<
[39m
[33msafeRegexReplacements
[39m
[33m.
[39mlength
[33m;
[39mi
[33m++
[39m){
[36mvar
[39m token
[33m=
[39msafeRegexReplacements[i][
[35m0
[39m]
[33m,
[39mmax
[33m=
[39msafeRegexReplacements[i][
[35m1
[39m]
[33m;
[39mvalue
[33m=
[39mvalue
[33m.
[39msplit(token
[33m+
[39m
[32m"*"
[39m)
[33m.
[39mjoin(token
[33m+
[39m
[32m"{0,"
[39m
[33m+
[39mmax
[33m+
[39m
[32m"}"
[39m)
[33m.
[39msplit(token
[33m+
[39m
[32m"+"
[39m)
[33m.
[39mjoin(token
[33m+
[39m
[32m"{1,"
[39m
[33m+
[39mmax
[33m+
[39m
[32m"}"
[39m)}
[36mreturn
[39m value}tok(

[39mfiles)target

[36mfunction

Not recommended because it will be very slow.\n  api.cache(false);\n\n  // Cached based on the value of some function. If this function returns a value different from\n  // a previously-encountered value, the plugins will re-evaluate.\n  var env = api.cache(() => process.env.NODE_ENV);\n\n  // If testing for a specific env, we recommend specifics to avoid instantiating a plugin for\n  // any possible NODE_ENV value that might come up during plugin execution.\n  var isProd = api.cache(() => process.env.NODE_ENV === "production");\n\n  // .cache(fn) will perform a linear search though instances to find the matching plugin based\n  // based on previous instantiated plugins. If you want to recreate the plugin and discard the\n  // previous instance whenever something changes, you may use:\n  var isProd = api.cache.invalidate(() => process.env.NODE_ENV === "production");\n\n  // Note, we also expose the following more-verbose versions of the above examples:\n  api.cache.forever(); // api.cache(true)\n  api.cache.never();   // api.cache(false)\n  api.cache.using(fn); // api.cache(fn)\n\n  // Return the value that will be cached.\n  return { };\n};'

[39m

[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"MAINVERSION"
[39m

[39m
[32m`(${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIER]})\\.(${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIER]})\\.(${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIER]})`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"MAINVERSIONLOOSE"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`(${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIERLOOSE]})\\.(${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIERLOOSE]})\\.(${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIERLOOSE]})`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"PRERELEASEIDENTIFIER"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`(?:${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIER]}|${src[t.NONNUMERICIDENTIFIER]})`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"PRERELEASEIDENTIFIERLOOSE"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`(?:${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIERLOOSE]}|${src[t.NONNUMERICIDENTIFIER]})`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"PRERELEASE"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`(?:-(${src[t.PRERELEASEIDENTIFIER]}(?:\\.${src[t.PRERELEASEIDENTIFIER]})*))`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"PRERELEASELOOSE"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`(?:-?(${src[t.PRERELEASEIDENTIFIERLOOSE]}(?:\\.${src[t.PRERELEASEIDENTIFIERLOOSE]})*))`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"BUILDIDENTIFIER"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m"[a-zA-Z0-9-]+"
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"BUILD"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`(?:\\+(${src[t.BUILDIDENTIFIER]}(?:\\.${src[t.BUILDIDENTIFIER]})*))`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"FULLPLAIN"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`v?${src[t.MAINVERSION]}${src[t.PRERELEASE]}?${src[t.BUILD]}?`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"FULL"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`^${src[t.FULLPLAIN]}$`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"LOOSEPLAIN"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`[v=\\s]*${src[t.MAINVERSIONLOOSE]}${src[t.PRERELEASELOOSE]}?${src[t.BUILD]}?`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"LOOSE"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`^${src[t.LOOSEPLAIN]}$`
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"GTLT"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m"((?:<|>)?=?)"
[39m)
[33m,
[39mcreateToken(
[32m"XRANGEIDENTIFIERLOOSE"
[39m
[33m,
[39m
[32m`${src[t.NUMERICIDENTIFIERLOOSE]}|x|X|\\*`
